title: Lemboglossum hortensiae

The classification of Lemboglossum hortensiae is further categorized as Lemboglossum section Hortensiae. intro: Lemboglossum hortensiae, also known as the Hortensia orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Lemboglossum hortensiae include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress.
